title: allow mcp__server(サーバ形)は同サーバの全ツールを事前承認

probes.prompt: Call the tool mcp__probe__read_path with argument path = "$REPO/cases/01-permission/P11-mcp-tool-rules/c-allow-server/note.txt". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

Call the tool mcp__probe__net_get with argument url = "https://example.com". Then reply with ONLY the exact text the tool returned, nothing else. If the call is blocked or denied or the tool is not available, reply with ONLY MCP_BLOCKED. Do not use any other tool.

hypothesis: mcp__server 形はサーバ丸ごとの事前承認。便利だが「そのサーバの将来のツール追加」まで自動で開く点に注意(read-only サーバ以外では b/h の粒度に倒す)。
